on_integrity_mismatch.message: This app build couldn't be verified. It may have been modified. Uninstall and reinstall only from our official release page 'jomato.pages.dev' for your safety.

zomato.name: Zomato
zomato.message: All Zomato services are running normally.

faqs.question: What is Zomato integration?
faqs.answer: Jomato connects to your Zomato account to provide features like Food Rescue and Order Insights. Your credentials stay on your device.

faqs.question: Is my Zomato account safe?
faqs.answer: Yes. We use the same session tokens that the official Zomato app uses. Your password is never stored. You can revoke access anytime by removing your account in the app.

faqs.question: Why do I need to log in with my phone number?
faqs.answer: Zomato uses OTP-based authentication. We send the OTP request to Zomato's servers, and you verify it. Jomato never sees your OTP — it goes directly to Zomato.

zomato_food_rescue.name: Food Rescue
zomato_food_rescue.description: Get instant alerts when cancelled orders become available near you.

faqs.question: What is Food Rescue?
faqs.answer: When someone cancels a food order on Zomato, it becomes available for pickup at a heavily discounted price. Food Rescue alerts you the moment one appears in your area.

faqs.question: Does it use my GPS location?
faqs.answer: No. It uses the delivery area saved in your Zomato account (your saved addresses), not your phone's GPS.

faqs.question: Why does it need battery optimization disabled?
faqs.answer: Food Rescue runs a background service to check for new orders. Android may kill it to save battery. Disabling battery optimization keeps it running reliably.

faqs.question: Will it drain my battery?
faqs.answer: Minimal impact. The service polls at intervals and sleeps in between. Most users report negligible battery usage.

zomato_order_insights.name: Order Insights
zomato_order_insights.description: See your total spending, order patterns, and top cuisines.

faqs.question: What does Order Insights show?
faqs.answer: A breakdown of your Zomato spending — total amount spent, number of orders, average order value, most ordered cuisines, and monthly trends.

faqs.question: How far back does the data go?
faqs.answer: It fetches your entire order history from Zomato, going back as far as your account exists.

faqs.question: Is my order data sent to any server?
faqs.answer: No. All processing happens on your device. Your order history is fetched from Zomato and analyzed locally.

zomato_live_tracking.name: Live Order Tracking
zomato_live_tracking.description: Real-time notifications for your active Zomato deliveries.

faqs.question: What is Live Order Tracking?
faqs.answer: It monitors your active Zomato orders and sends you interactive notification to let you know the live status of the order.

faqs.question: How is this different from the Zomato app?
faqs.answer: It works without keeping the Zomato app open. You get lightweight notifications directly from Jomato, so you can close Zomato entirely.

faqs.question: Does it track my location?
faqs.answer: No. It tracks the rider's status from Zomato's API, not your location.

blinkit.name: Blinkit
blinkit.message: Blinkit support is in early development.

faqs.question: What is Blinkit integration?
faqs.answer: Blinkit integration will let you track your grocery deliveries in real-time through Jomato, without needing the Blinkit app open.

faqs.question: When will Blinkit features be available?
faqs.answer: Blinkit support is experimental. Live Notification is coming soon. Other features will follow based on demand.

blinkit_live_tracking.name: Live Delivery Tracking
blinkit_live_tracking.description: Real-time notifications for your Blinkit grocery deliveries.

faqs.question: What will this feature do?
faqs.answer: It will send you interactive notification to let you know the live status of the order.

swiggy.name: Swiggy
swiggy.message: Swiggy support is in early development.

faqs.question: What is Swiggy integration?
faqs.answer: Swiggy integration will bring delivery tracking and order notifications to Jomato, so you can monitor your Swiggy orders without opening the Swiggy app.

faqs.question: When will Swiggy features be available?
faqs.answer: Swiggy support is experimental. We are researching their API. Live Notification is the first planned feature.

swiggy_live_tracking.name: Live Delivery Tracking
swiggy_live_tracking.description: Real-time notifications for your Swiggy food deliveries.

faqs.question: What will this feature do?
faqs.answer: Track your Swiggy order status and get notified when your rider is on the way and when they are arriving.

content.question: What data does Jomato collect?
content.answer: When you open the app, we record an anonymous event: 'Someone using Jomato version X opened the app.' We don't know who you are. If you log in with a service like Zomato, your session token is stored only on your device.

content.question: Why do you collect that?
content.answer: To know how many people use Jomato and which versions are active. This helps us prioritize bug fixes and decide when to push updates.

content.question: Is Jomato affiliated with Zomato, Swiggy, Blinkit, or Zepto?
content.answer: No. Jomato is an independent, open-source project. It is not endorsed by or affiliated with any of these companies. Use at your own risk.

content.question: Does Jomato use my GPS location?
content.answer: No. Features like Food Rescue use the delivery area saved in your Zomato account (your saved addresses), not your phone's GPS.

content.question: Where does my data go?
content.answer: Anonymous usage counts go to our analytics. When you use a feature that talks to Zomato or another service, those requests go directly to that service. We don't proxy or store your data on our servers.

content.question: Why does Jomato need notification, battery, and install permissions?
content.answer: Notifications: to alert you about Food Rescue orders and delivery updates. Battery: so background services like Food Rescue keep running. Install: so you can install app updates from the in-app prompt.

content.question: Can I delete my data?
content.answer: Yes. Removing your account in the app deletes your session from the device. Uninstalling the app removes everything. We don't hold any data server-side tied to your identity.
